jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at SigTuple
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
